channel.title: 2026-05-31 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-31 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Quantum-Enhanced Land Classification for Reforestation using Quantum Machine Learning and GIS
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Satyam Shrivastav, Varad Trimbakkar, Purav Shah, Dr. Nilkamal More (Corresponding Author)
This work investigates the feasibility of using quantum machine learning for reforestation-suitability classification in the Mumbai region by integrating Quantum Support Vector Machines (QSVMs) with a GIS-based preprocessing pipeline. Satellite-derived indicators---NDVI, rainfall, slope, soil pH, and soil organic carbon---are extracted from Google Earth Engine and labeled using rule-based ecological thresholds. The resulting dataset is standardized, scaled to ([-1, 1]), balanced with SMOTE, and compressed using Principal Component Analysis (PCA) to align the feature dimension with the number of qubits. Two quantum kernel models, based on Pauli and ZZ feature maps, are implemented in Qiskit and evaluated against classical SVM baselines under identical preprocessing conditions. On the balan…

item.title: Superluminal Propagation of Light and Anomalous Phase Shift in a Λ-Type Atomic Medium
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Najm Uddin, Muhammad Idrees, Latif Ur Rahman, O. A. I. Elzibar, Naglaa Mohammed, Osman Abdalla Adam Osman 等7位作者
Light-matter interaction between a light field and an atomic medium could be used to manipulate the medium’s dispersive properties, leading to subluminal and superluminal regimes. Utilizing the same idea, this work investigates the propagation of structured superluminal light and anomalous phase shifts in a Λ- type three-level atomic medium, where a structured control field governs the atomic system. The absorption and dispersion properties are modulated by the azimuthal quantum number (ℓ) of the control field. The maxima and minima of the absorption spectrum, along with the corresponding normal and anomalous dispersion peaks, are enhanced with a (2ℓ) dependence on the azimuthal quantum number in the medium. The negative group index and anomalous phase shift vary within the ranges −1000 ≤…

item.title: Quantum light gives a 20-fold boost to ultrafast laser processes
item.description:
📚 Physics News
Nonlinear interactions between light and matter are at the heart of some of the most powerful tools in modern optics, but pushing these processes to their limits has long been hampered by a fundamental constraint: the stronger you make the laser, the more likely it is to destroy whatever it illuminates.
